diff -ruN output

I tried to make a patch for darktable 1.6.0. Please take a look at it.

Notes:

* The project seems to have moved to Github and I am not sure how to link to the release tag correctly. I tried to link to the official link specified in the release announcement.
* files contains patches for displaying the correct version (the old patches are not applicable anymore)
* extended the pkg-plist file
